title: Better Golden Apple Counter
description: Shows you how many Gaps sb has in his hand, while staying the same in the hotbar.
body:
# Phiros Gap Counter

##Describtion
This pack shows how many Gaps you still have. The texture stays the same in the Hotbar / GUI tho to make it look way cleaner. This pack is very usefull when you need to take care of how many gaps your opponent has for example: NethPot, SMP, DiamondSMP, UHC...

## Ingame
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aac758aa8568820919557ecdd3245d76bb1b452b.png)

## Features
1. Shows How Many Apples you have
2. Removed Eating Particles
3. Normal in GUI
4. Eating Animations

### Credits
thanks to chatgpt for explaining me how the items json works <3
